name: Checkout ImagePullBackOff remediation
description: Expected tool trajectory: inspect the workload, then patch the bad image. Scored against each framework's captured OTel trace with agentevals tool_trajectory_avg_score.

parts.text: the checkout service is down - investigate, then fix it
Root cause: the checkout deployment is pinned to a nonexistent image nginx:1.27-doesnotexist, so the pod is in ImagePullBackOff. Fix: patch the image to a valid tag (nginx:1.27).
